calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-08-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT ELLA HENDERSON'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED 6/15/09. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)

DEMURRER
Off Calendar May-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- FAY C. CALLIER, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ELLA HENDERSON DBA SHEKINAH CHRISTIAN FELLOWSHIP OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE : 1) THE THREE DAY NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT WAS SERVED BY POSTING ON MARCH 27, 2009, THE DAY AFTER IT EXPIRED, THUS ALLOWING INSUFFICIENT TIME FOR DEFENDANT TO CURE HER ALLEGED DEFAULT. 2) THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES ONLY THE POSTING DATE OF SUCH NOTICE AS THE MEANS OF SERVICE OF IT, ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF ALLEGES SHE MAILED IT MARCH 23, 2009 AND YET FAILS TO ASSERT SERVICE BY MANUAL DELIVERY AND MAILING. 3) PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO THE DEMURRER IS LEGALLY IMPERMISSIBLE AND THEREFORE, THE COMPLAINT IS UNCERTAIN AS TO THE RENTAL AMOUNT DUE. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AND SERVE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT BY JUNE 1, 2009 AND DEFENDANT MAY FILE AND SERVE A PLEADING THERETO BY JUNE 5, 2009. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Quentin Kopp, Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR # 12891 =301/QK
